left.title: Monument to the People's Heroes
points: Proposed creative revision to the design
Personally designed pedestal ornamentation and wreath reliefs

right.title: Babaoshan Revolutionary Cemetery

slides.label: Pioneer
slides.heading: First Architectural Paper: A Revelation
points: First architectural theory article published by a Chinese scholar
Defined basic features of the timber frame structural system
Rebutted Western misreadings of Chinese architecture
Drew a complete conceptual framework for Chinese architectural history

steps.title: "Architectural Intent" Concept
steps.desc: Convergence of technique, beauty, history, and human feeling

steps.title: Qing Style Construction Manual
steps.desc: Summarized theoretical framework of Chinese architecture

steps.title: Folk Architecture Pioneer
steps.desc: First to propose protection of vernacular buildings

slides.label: Resilience
slides.heading: Architectural Fighter Through War
slides.desc: Surveying ancient buildings in remote valleys — wind, rain, and hardship without retreat.

slides.text: What beauty? I have so much work to do!

slides.label: Legacy
slides.heading: The Career She Wanted to Pursue for Life

columns.title: Disciplinary Foundation
points: Co-founded architecture departments at Northeastern and Tsinghua
Surveyed ancient buildings in remote wilderness

columns.title: Intellectual Pioneer
points: Poured final energy into national emblem and monument

slides.text: Architect Lin Huiyin's Tomb · She proved with her life that she was an architect in every sense
